name: Oyster Pan Roast
recipeInstructions:
1. In the top of a double boiler, combine clam broth, 1 tablespoon of butter, 1/4 teaspoon paprika, celery salt, and Worcestershire sauce. Stir gently.
2. Add oysters and simmer until their edges start to curl, about 1 minute.
3. Stir in chili sauce and half and half, then heat through.
4. Place a slice of toast in a warm bowl. Pour the oyster pan roast over the toast.
5. Float the remaining tablespoon of butter on top and sprinkle with a pinch of paprika.
6. Serve immediately.
